_README: R15 hold-out eval set for scripts/eval-quotes.mjs.
Each entry is an (intake -> tradie-verified expected Good/Better/Best) pair.
FLAG-NOT-FABRICATE: every pair below is a STARTER PLACEHOLDER. The expected
price bands, BOM line sets, and labour hours are NOT tradie-verified and were
NOT taken from any authoritative AU source. They exist only to exercise the
harness shape (rubric validation + scorecard skeleton). needs_grading=true on
every pair until a real tradie grades it against real AU buy prices + a real
BOM. The harness REFUSES to count a needs_grading pair toward an accuracy
score (it is a structure check only). Do NOT treat these numbers as ground
truth and do NOT let them gate a deploy.
Target: >=30 graded pairs (target 100) sourced from the 157 real intakes +
tenants' past quotes, sampled across the top-5 job types (downlights,
hot_water, power_points, ceiling_fans, blocked_drain). See the spec R15/R16.

pairs.provenance: PLACEHOLDER - not tradie-verified, not from an AU source
